bird.name: 红玉蜂鸟
bird.summary: The Brazilian ruby (Heliodoxa rubricauda) is a species of hummingbird in the "brilliants", tribe Heliantheini , in the subfamily Lesbiinae.…

locations.name: 巴伊亞州
locations.summary: 巴伊亚（葡萄牙語：Bahia）是巴西的26个州之一，地处东北部。面积565,733平方千米，首府是萨尔瓦多。巴伊亚北部是阿拉戈斯州、塞尔希培州、伯南布哥州和皮奥伊州，东部是大西洋，西部有戈亚斯州和托坎廷斯州，南部有米纳斯吉拉斯州和聖埃斯皮…

relations.subject: 红玉蜂鸟
relations.evidence: The Brazilian ruby is found in eastern and southeastern Brazil from Bahia south to Rio Grande do Sul

relations.subject: 红玉蜂鸟
relations.evidence: It inhabits the interior of forests, scrublands, parks, and banana plantations, and is frequently seen at feeders
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
